description: Gemfile pulling in a form-object framework when ActiveModel::Model is sufficient
input:
# Gemfile
gem 'reform'           # form object framework
gem 'dry-validation'   # validation library
gem 'virtus'           # attribute coercion

# app/forms/signup_form.rb
class SignupForm < Reform::Form
  property :email
  property :name

  validates :email, presence: true
  validates :name, presence: true
end
